title: Substack vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Substack vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Substack and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Substack is built for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers monetising directly from subscribers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Substack wins for writers monetising directly from subscribers, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Substack or Loops?
faq.a: Substack starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Substack?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
